title: The Lost Prince
summaries: "The Lost Prince" by Frances Hodgson Burnett is a novel published in 1915. Marco Loristan and his friend, a street urchin called "The Rat," are entrusted with a dangerous secret mission across Europe. As sons of no apparent importance, they must deliver a cryptic message that could spark revolution in the troubled kingdom of Samavia. Their journey is fraught with danger, and its success could overthrow a cruel dictatorship. But Marco may discover that his own destiny is far greater than he ever imagined.
